title: Surgeon Vacancy at Neuland Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Neuland Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Neuland Laboratories in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Neuland Laboratories:
Neuland Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories!
